design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Narrative Adventure through its core adventure loop.

gdd_outline.combat_notes: Combat pacing should match genre tempo and readable threat language.
constraints: Signature mechanics must reinforce genre fantasy
gdd_outline.core_loop: Traverse authored spaces, interact with objects and characters, make dialogue or moral choices, and unlock new story chapters or locations.
gdd_outline.economy_notes: Tune earn/spend to genre tension targets.
gdd_outline.overview: Narrative adventures prioritize story revelation, environmental storytelling, and dialogue-driven choices over skill-heavy combat. Progression is measured in discovered plot beats and character relationships.
gdd_outline.progression_notes: Follow signature mechanic dependencies across early, mid, and late phases.

mechanics.expression: Branching conversations alter relationships and outcomes.
mechanics.map_notes: Branching conversations alter relationships and outcomes.

mechanics.expression: Story advances through discrete chapters or acts.
mechanics.map_notes: Story advances through discrete chapters or acts.

mechanics.expression: Inspectable objects and triggers reveal lore and unlock paths.
mechanics.map_notes: Inspectable objects and triggers reveal lore and unlock paths.

narrative.core_loop: Traverse authored spaces, interact with objects and characters, make dialogue or moral choices, and unlock new story chapters or locations.
narrative.description: Narrative adventures prioritize story revelation, environmental storytelling, and dialogue-driven choices over skill-heavy combat. Progression is measured in discovered plot beats and character relationships.

pacing.early: Teach dialogue choice consequences with low failure cost.
pacing.late: Test full signature loop mastery under peak constraints.
pacing.mid: Combine supporting mechanics and raise resource or pattern pressure.

variants.label: Hardcore Narrative Adventure
variants.notes: Tighter economy and higher failure cost for experienced players.
